description_long: This is a two-story wooden cabin elevated on stilts, featuring a prominent gable roof with shingle texture and a wraparound balcony on the upper floor. The exterior is painted in muted gray tones, with vertical wooden siding and white trim. The front facade includes a covered porch area below and a balcony above, both supported by sturdy posts. Visible details include a set of stairs leading to the upper level, a small chimney, and several barrels or containers on the ground floor. The windows are large and symmetrically arranged, with the upper floor featuring a set of French doors opening onto the balcony. The cabin sits on a sandy or dirt base, suggesting a coastal or rustic setting.
description: A two-story, gray wooden cabin on stilts with a gable roof, wraparound balcony, and large windows, featuring a covered porch and exterior stairs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the balcony, French doors, covered porch, and barrels beneath the structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the shingled gable roof, symmetrical windows, and the staircase leading to the upper floor.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the balcony's railing, the staircase, and the sandy base beneath the cabin.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the balcony, porch area, and additional support posts.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch and shingle covering, featuring overhanging eaves
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple large rectangular windows symmetrically arranged on both floors, with a set of French doors on the upper floor opening to the balcony; windows are grouped in pairs or sets, providing a balanced appearance
attribute_door_placement: One main exterior door on the upper floor, accessed via the balcony and exterior staircase, centrally located on the front facade
